# takeout_sample — Sanitized Takeout Fixture

Anonymized Google Takeout export fixture for spec 013 integration tests.

## Structure

```
takeout_sample/
└── Takeout/
    └── YouTube 및 YouTube Music/
        ├── 채널/
        │   └── 채널.csv              — 1 anonymized channel row
        ├── 동영상 메타데이터/
        │   └── 동영상.csv            — 9 video metadata rows
        └── 동영상/
            ├── 1-1.강의자A_과목1_1주차_1차시.mp4
            ├── 1-2.강의자A_과목1_1주차_2차시.mp4
            ├── 2-1.강의자A_과목1_2주차_1차시.mp4
            ├── 2-2.강의자A_과목1_2주차_2차시.mp4
            ├── 3-1.강의자A_과목1_3주차_1차시.mp4
            ├── 3-2.강의자A_과목1_3주차_2차시.mp4
            ├── 1-1.강의자A_과목1_1주차_1차시(2023).mp4
            ├── 4-1.강의자A_과목1_4주차_1차시.mp4
            └── 4-2.강의자A_과목1_4주차_2차시.mp4
```

## Video IDs and Durations

| video_id      | title                                  | duration (ms) | mp4 duration (s) |
|---------------|----------------------------------------|---------------|-----------------|
| aaaaaaaaaaa   | 1-1.강의자A_과목1_1주차_1차시          | 6300000       | 6.0             |
| bbbbbbbbbbb   | 1-2.강의자A_과목1_1주차_2차시          | 5400000       | 5.0             |
| ccccccccccc   | 2-1.강의자A_과목1_2주차_1차시          | 7200000       | 7.0             |
| ddddddddddd   | 2-2.강의자A_과목1_2주차_2차시          | 6600000       | 6.6             |
| eeeeeeeeeee   | 3-1.강의자A_과목1_3주차_1차시          | 7800000       | 7.8             |
| fffffffffff   | 3-2.강의자A_과목1_3주차_2차시          | 5100000       | 5.0             |
| ggggggggggg   | 1-1.강의자A_과목1_1주차_1차시 (2023)   | 6360000       | 6.0             |
| hhhhhhhhhhh   | 4-1.강의자A_과목1_4주차_1차시          | 8400000       | 8.0             |
| iiiiiiiiiii   | 4-2.강의자A_과목1_4주차_2차시          | 4800000       | 4.8             |

Notes:
- `ggggggggggg` has the same title as `aaaaaaaaaaa` (different year) — used to test
  ambiguous mapping / duplicate-title edge case.
- All mp4 files are 1-second silent H.264/AAC test patterns generated by ffmpeg.
  They are valid containers readable by ffprobe but contain no real lecture content.
- All channel IDs, video IDs, and titles are anonymized.
- CSV duration (ms) and mp4 actual duration are within ±1 second — satisfies
  evidence score signal threshold (FR-003, R-3).

## Generation

mp4 files were generated with:

```
ffmpeg -f lavfi -i color=c=black:s=320x240:r=1:d=<dur> \
       -f lavfi -i anullsrc=r=44100:cl=mono \
       -t <dur> -c:v libx264 -crf 51 -preset ultrafast \
       -c:a aac -b:a 32k -shortest <title>.mp4
```
